svg.title: CharityHub system architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram: Browser client connects down into a Laravel 11 application container holding HTTP routing, a Public App plus Admin Panel application layer, and a Service Domain layer with Payments, Events and Jobs, and Certificates modules. External services (Stripe, Google Maps, Google OAuth, Mailtrap) sit to the right connected by a dashed API arrow. MySQL database sits below the main container.
